name: Mirror Goggles (Moderate)
description:
These goggles feature highly reflective lenses. While wearing the goggles, you gain a +2 item bonus to visual Perception checks and to saving throws against visual effects.

Activate R (manipulate)

Trigger A creature within 60 feet targets you with a visual effect

Effect You turn your head to reflect aspects of the triggering effect back at its creator. The creature must attempt a save as it becomes disoriented by this reflection. On a failure, the creature is Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure). The creature is temporarily immune for 1 hour.
